infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Helfi to use your camera so you can take a photo for food logging, journal notes, or profile photos when you choose.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Allow Helfi to read selected Apple Health data, such as steps, distance, and active calories, so it can show your daily activity in your health dashboard.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Helfi to use your location to show relevant nearby practitioners when matches are available.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Helfi to use your microphone only when you tap the voice button, so it can turn spoken requests such as "add breakfast" or "log a 20 minute walk" into text.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Helfi to access your photos so you can log food from meal and nutrition label images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Helfi to save or manage selected journal photos when needed.
